topic: ORTHODONTIC TREATMENT — Comprehensive orthodontic treatment of the adult dentition TEMPOROMANDIBULAR JOINT DISORDER TREATMENT • Benefits for treatment of TMJ are limited to a yearly benefit maximum of $1,000 per member and a lifetime benefit maximum of $5,000 per member. • TMJ treatment is covered only if the Participating Provider prepares the treatment plan prior to starting treatment and provides the treatment. • The repair or replacement of lost, stolen, or broken TMJ appliances is not covered. • “Medical Services” for the purpose of this benefit, to be covered, must be:
